def positive_python_perf_layer_collection_iteration_enumerate_list_materialized():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_collection_iteration_enumerate_list_materialized"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Layer: Collection iteration. Flag list(enumerate(...)) materialization before immediate iteration."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
